title: Family Island — Farming game
notes:
Hey Islanders!
We're always improving Family Island! This update includes bug fixes, performance enhancements, and a whole lot of love to make your island life even better.
Explore, adventure, and win amazing rewards!
Want to share the fun? Invite your friends to play and get FREE REWARDS! Join our community on Facebook and Instagram for more fun.
Loving Family Island? Leave a review!

title: Match Villains
notes:
Fireworks up, summer on. 100 new levels await!

NEW ITEM: LAVA BORDER! The board looks quiet… maybe too quiet. Make matches and reveal what’s hiding under the heat.

NEW EVENT: MUSEUM BREAK! Tick-tock, Villains. Move deeper into the museum, grab the rewards, and try not to look too suspicious.

NEW SAFE CRACKERS: JULY FOURTH! Crack safes and unlock a firework-ready NEW STYLE.

NEW POSTER: ANCIENT GIANTS! Big heads, bigger secrets. These ancient faces know something.

Stay sharp, Villains!
